text: Morris water maze (MWM) test as a means to investigate spatial learning and memory in laboratory rats reveals that the disconnection among neuronal networks  are responsible for the performance impairment of MWM test rather than the damage or injury of certain part of brain . (aopwiki.org/relationships/359; D'Hooge and De Deyn, 2001). However, it is well established that alterations in synaptic transmission and plasticity contribute to deficits in cognitive function (aopwiki.org/relationships/359).
